title: On's Co-CEO Marc Maurer Says Zendaya and the Olympics Powered Record Q3 Results
text: On Holding's Co-CEO Marc Maurer attributed record Q3 2024 results to strategic partnerships with Zendaya and strong presence at the Paris Olympics. The company achieved record net sales and profitability in Q3 2024. Management cited the Zendaya partnership as a key driver for brand awareness growth, noting that aided awareness in the U.S. jumped to 20% after the Olympics, a significant increase from prior levels. The Olympics provided a platform for On to connect and build credibility as an innovation-driven premium performance brand globally. These initiatives support On's goal of doubling 2023 revenues by 2026 through scaling retail networks, growing apparel, and increasing reach in the Asia-Pacific region.
